sections.paragraph: m. שֵׁנִית f. ordinal adj., second (see the root שָׁנָה No. I., 3 ), Gen 1:8 Exo 1:15, etc. (Arab. ثَان, f. ثَانِيَةُ, Ch. תִּנְיָן, Syr. ܬܰܪܝܳܢܐܳ) Fem. שְׁנִית, also adverb. a second time, again, Gen 22:15 41:5 . Pl. שְׁנִיִּים the second (as to place), Num 2:16 chambers on the second story, Gen 6:16.
